fields.label: Monthly Token Budget
fields.description: 0 = unlimited. Otherwise hard cap before overage billing kicks in.

fields.label: Provider
fields.options:
Anthropic
OpenAI
Google Gemini
Mistral
Groq
Together AI
DeepSeek
Moonshot (Kimi)
OpenRouter
Ollama (local)
vLLM (local)
OpenAI-Compatible

fields.label: Model
fields.description: Provider-specific model identifier (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6, gpt-4o, gemini-2.0-flash, deepseek-chat, moonshot-v1-32k, llama-3.1-70b).

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: API key for the chosen provider. Leave blank for local providers (Ollama, vLLM).

fields.label: Base URL
fields.description: Only for local or OpenAI-Compatible providers (e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1 for Ollama). Leave blank for hosted providers.

fields.label: Temperature
fields.description: 0.0 = deterministic, 1.0 = creative. 0.2 is a good default for analytical Q&A.

fields.label: Jarvis Admin Connection
fields.description: Populated by the signup wizard; not customer-editable.

fields.label: Jarvis Admin URL
fields.description: HTTPS URL of the Jarvis admin host. Used for signup, billing, subscription state.

fields.label: Jarvis Admin API Key
fields.description: Native Frappe api_key for the customer's User on the admin site. Paired with the secret below as `Authorization: token <key>:<secret>`.

fields.label: Jarvis Admin API Secret
fields.description: Native Frappe api_secret paired with the API Key. Set automatically at onboarding.

fields.label: Agent Operator
fields.description: Operator config — populated by jarvis.openclaw_bootstrap.start (dev) or the Jarvis admin signup response (prod).

fields.label: Agent URL
fields.description: WebSocket URL for the customer's openclaw agent (e.g. ws://127.0.0.1:18789 in dev; wss://<subdomain>.<admin-host>:443 in prod)

fields.label: Agent Token
fields.description: Bearer token used to authenticate the secrets.reload RPC and the chat worker's WebSocket session

fields.label: Chat Device ID
fields.description: sha256(rawPublicKey).hex — openclaw deviceId this bench was paired as. Set lazily on first chat; cleared on re-pair.

fields.label: Chat Device Public Key
fields.description: Base64url-encoded Ed25519 public key registered with openclaw at pair time.

fields.label: Chat Device Private Key
fields.description: Base64url-encoded Ed25519 private key. Never leaves this bench. Used to sign the connect challenge at every chat WS handshake.

fields.label: Chat Device Token
fields.description: Bearer token openclaw issued at pair time. Sent in auth.deviceToken at every chat WS connect.
